name: Arnold TradingView Overlay
description: Long_position widget creation now uses a bare {shape, overrides} payload — TV's 2026-05-08 build silently returns null when top-level `text:` is included alongside `shape: 'long_position'` (same class as the prior `disableSave` rejection). Header text is applied via setProperties post-create instead. Earlier: unified win/loss geometry (anchor at entry, stopLevel from original 1R, profitLevel from planned 2R), original 1R stop band always visible + dashed trail line at placed stop, 5-step heatmap zone palette, hierarchy<0.5 paint threshold, promise-rejection labels in /api/tv-overlay/debug, pyramid size in header, halt amber recolor, exit_reason suffix.
